prompt: Modern cultural logo design on pure black background. The letters MM are formed by two vertical parallel lines that morph into a tribal-geometric pattern at the top — inspired by Taino indigenous art from the Caribbean but reimagined in a sharp, modern, minimal style. The lines are clean white with small geometric details in electric cyan (#00E3FF) at the intersection points. Below the symbol, 'MM AGENCY' in clean modern sans-serif uppercase with wide letter spacing and a cyan dot at the end. The aesthetic blends Dominican Caribbean cultural roots with contemporary design — heritage meets tech. Vector sharp, minimal, balanced. Professional brand identity on matte black.
